steps.title: Scale the given equation
steps.content:
The target expression $12x-2$ is close to $3$ times the left side of $4x+5=17$. Multiply the equation by $3$.
$$3(4x+5)=3(17)$$
$$12x+15=51$$

steps.title: Adjust to the target
steps.content:
Subtract $17$ from both sides to get the requested expression.
$$12x+15-17=51-17$$
$$12x-2=34$$
The answer is 34.
